items.claim: Mike Davis has issues with his conditioning and slowing down significantly in the later rounds of his fights.
items.quote: he was slowing down. I mean, in that second round, I don't want to say he was gassed, but it was kind of lucky there.

items.claim: Nural Aliev has superior wrestling that will allow him to out-wrestle Mike Davis over 15 minutes.
items.quote: I think he could probably out wrestle a guy like Mike Davis for 15 full minutes.

items.claim: Nural Aliev has better cardio and pace than Mike Davis.
items.quote: He can hang more than a guy like Mike Davis can.

items.claim: Mike Davis is less committed to his fighting career due to outside interests like coaching and social media.
items.quote: he's doing stuff outside of the cage. He has a big Instagram following. He's doing coaching work and stuff like that.

items.claim: Cody Gibson struggles with grappling and TDD.
items.quote: Cody Gibson, who has really struggled with the grappling throughout the years.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice at 38 years old.
items.quote: at 38 years old at bantamweight taken this fight. He's taken it on short notice as well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has strong grappling and dangerous back-taking ability.
items.quote: he's pretty tricky when it comes to the overall grappling though. And I think that's going to be his main path to victory
